Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There may be dangerous chemicals inside.[n]I better not go in without permission...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16014 0 0}Well, what should we do with this...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We can't burn it, because that would release harmful chemicals.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe we should just throw it away...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I try entering the science lab?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1582 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Oh, you're {f 4 1} from 2-F. Do you have any interest in this anatomical model?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1582 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16006 0 0}I was just about to get rid of it. It's old and ugly, and the students think it's creepy...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1582 0 -1 -1 0 0}But it's such a waste. I hoped someone could take it, as long as they don't use it for anything weird...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1582 0 -1 -1 0 0}Yes, I think that's a good idea. I'll let you have it, then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1582 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16016 0 0}Well, off you go. I'm going to lock up this room now.[n]{f 1 1}
